prompt_text: Write a cover letter for Sarah applying for a product manager internship. Sarah has led projects and created user stories with an engineering team.
response_text:
[Your Name]
[Your Address]
[City, State ZIP Code]
[Date]

[Hiring Manager's Name]
[Company Name]
[Company Address]
[City, State ZIP Code]

Dear [Hiring Manager's Name],

I am excited to apply for the Product Manager Intern position at [Company Name]. As a highly motivated and detail-oriented individual with a passion for product development, I am confident that my skills and experience make me an ideal candidate for this role.

Throughout my academic and professional journey, I have had the opportunity to work closely with engineering teams, leading projects and collaborating on product development. In my previous roles, I have successfully created user stories, prioritized features, and worked with cross-functional teams to bring products to market. My experience has taught me the importance of effective communication, stakeholder management, and data-driven decision making.

As a product manager, I believe that my strengths lie in my ability to balance business and technical requirements, drive product vision, and ensure that products meet customer needs. I am excited about the opportunity to join [Company Name] and contribute to the development of innovative products that make a meaningful impact on customers' lives.

I am particularly drawn to [Company Name] because of its commitment to [company values or mission that resonate with you]. As someone who is passionate about [related passion], I believe that I would thrive in an environment that prioritizes [related value].

In addition to my experience and skills, I bring a strong work ethic, a willingness to learn, and a collaborative mindset to the table. I am excited about the opportunity to learn from and contribute to the [Company Name] team and am confident that my skills and experience make me a strong fit for this role.

Thank you for considering my application. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss my qualifications further and learn more about the Product Manager Intern position at [Company Name]. Please feel free to contact me at [Your Email Address] or [Your Phone Number].

Sincerely,

Sarah
